top_gap_prompt: Best way to monitor application performance and response latency for a engineering teams at SaaS companies team
category_long: application performance monitoring and error tracking platform

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Sentry's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Sentry's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Sentry lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.
